name: Microsoft Edge (Legacy UWP) Browsing History
categoryDescription: User behavior artifacts — browsing history, recently accessed files, search terms, and folder navigation.
description: Legacy UWP Microsoft Edge (EdgeHTML) typed URL history — URL, timestamp, and visit count. Only relevant on Windows 10 pre-Chromium Edge.
forensic_value: TypedURLs are manually entered URLs — high investigative value. Chromium-based Edge stores history in SQLite, not registry.
